CustomField.description: Mapped from SaaS Opps in CW flow. Can also be updated manually by activation reps.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Mapped from CW SaaS Opps, can only be used by Sales if Onboarding Path = Site-Add AND the opportunity is related to an Account that is a Child Account (ie. an Account that has a Parent Account assigned).
CustomField.label: Declined SaaS Training
